HGSS.563.0000:
Hm? Who are you?\f
[0103,0000,0000], eh? You want me to make
some Balls?\f
Sorry, but that’ll have to wait.\f
Do you know Team Rocket?
Ah, don’t worry. I’ll tell you anyhow.\f
Team Rocket’s an evil gang that
uses Pokémon for their dirty work.\f
They’re supposed to have disbanded
three years ago.\f
Anyway, they’re at the well, cutting
off SlowpokeTails for sale!\f
So I’m going to go give them a
lesson in pain!\f
Hang on, SLOWPOKE!
Old Kurt is on his way!
HGSS.563.0001:
Kurt: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
You handled yourself like a real hero.\f
As I mentioned before, Team Rocket was
disbanded by a boy called Red three\r
years ago.\f
Now that they have come back...
I have a bad feeling about it...\f
In any case, it would please me greatly
to make Poké Balls for a Trainer\r
like you, [0103,0000,0000].\r
This is all I have now, but take it.\f
HGSS.563.0003:
Kurt: I make Poké Balls from Apricorns.\f
Collect them from trees and bring
’em to me.\f
I’ll make Poké Balls out of them.
HGSS.563.0004:
Kurt: You have Apricorns for me?\r
Fine! I’ll turn them into Poké Balls.\f
HGSS.563.0005:
Kurt: It’ll take a day to make you a
Poké Ball. Come back for it later.
HGSS.563.0007:
Kurt: I’m working!
Don’t bother me!
HGSS.563.0008:
Kurt: Ah, [0103,0000,0000]!\r
I just finished your Poké Ball. Here!\f
HGSS.563.0009:
Kurt: Your Bag is full!
Come back when it’s lighter.
HGSS.563.0010:
Kurt: That turned out great.\f
Try catching Pokémon with it.
HGSS.563.0011:
The SLOWPOKE are gone...
Were they taken away by bad people?
HGSS.563.0013:
The SLOWPOKE my dad gave me came
back! Its tail has grown back, too!
HGSS.563.0014:
Dad works at Silph where he studies
Poké Balls.\f
I have to stay home with Grandpa
and SLOWPOKE.
HGSS.563.0015:
That’s right!
I’ll give you my grandpa’s number. [0200,0000]
HGSS.563.0017:
My grandpa can tell you more
about Apricorns.
HGSS.563.0018:
No? Why?
You don’t want to talk to my grandpa?
HGSS.563.0019:
You want to talk to my grandpa,
don’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.563.0021:
You see three people, with landscape
in the background.\f
It’s Kurt, Professor Oak, and...
in the middle,\r
a lady with determined eyes.
HGSS.563.0022:
It’s a statue of the forest’s
protector.
HGSS.563.0023:
The radio is on.\f
It’s Professor Oak’s Pokémon Talk!
HGSS.563.0024:
The radio is declaring the revival
of Team Rocket!
